subject: Noise2Map options for final map denoising
body:
Happy New Year! 

What options are used in M to produce denoised maps? 

I am trying to apply Noise2Map to a Relion-generated map. Would something 
like this generate the best possible result, or I am missing something 
important:

 Noise2Map --half1 run_half1_class001_unfil.mrc --half2 
run_half2_class001_unfil.mrc  --angpix 3.12

Peter
